title: TC4 wand focus architect/area parity batch
implemented: Added FocusArchitectRuntime preserving original wand NBT keys areax/areay/areaz/aread and picked block key.
Replaced Stage171 equal-trade square helper with original-style connected swap and architect plane traversal.
Equal Trade sneak-use now stores a picked block on the wand; offhand remains an explicit Forge 1.19.2 fallback adapter until original client pick overlay is restored.
Warding now uses original-style architect area traversal for ward and unward actions, including owner/ward checks.

Added FocusUpgradeRuntime canApplyUpgrade gates for original dependent upgrades: warding enlarge requires architect, shock enlarge requires chain/earthshock, alchemist fire/frost require the original projectile/beam upgrades.
Equal Trade selection now matches original block+metadata intent via exact BlockState equality and excludes block entities like original TC4 tile-entity guard.
forge_1192_adapters: Block-state-to-picked-stack serialization uses ItemStack save/load in wand NBT because TC4 1.7.10 item/block metadata mapping is not directly reusable.
Equal Trade block harvest/replace uses Forge/vanilla 1.19.2 Block.dropResources and level.setBlock while preserving original treasure/silk upgrade intent.
Client architect overlay/keybind packet is not yet complete; runtime NBT/state is now compatible with later overlay work.
drift_fixed: Removed old equalTradeTargets square-plane helper from active runtime path.
